sections.paragraph:
ὑπαϰοή, ῆς, ἡ [ὑπακούω] ‘state of being in compliance’, obedience

—a. of submission to a human master Ro 6:16a.

—b. of submission to divine will or program Ro 5:19; 6:16b; 15:18; 16:19; 2 Cor 7:15; 10:5f; 1 Pt 1:2, 14, 22; Hb 5:8. ὑπαϰοὴ πίστεως obedience that faith elicits Ro 1:5; 16:26.

—c. of compliance with a request (Paul awaits a positive answer) Phlm 21.
